scene: Stan doing nothing on the couch with a gray guilt cloud over his head, big black caps WHY THE GUILT? (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A small workshop hut morphing into a big smoking factory, big black caps FACTORIES. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A glowing halo over the word WORK and a trash bin swallowing the words IDLE TIME, big black caps WORK = HOLY. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A cozy couch stamped with a red MORAL FAILURE stamp, big black caps REBRANDED. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
An old-timey salesman holding a sign reading LIVE TO WORK with a big red question mark, big black caps 400-YEAR-OLD SALES PITCH. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
